1.content:
Note: some of the first chapter will be told from coop’s POV

It all happened so quickly, one minute you went into the shed to grease up your skateboard wheels, the next you ended up fighting your sisters obviously evil alien Kat in front of some weird ray that goes off, after that all you see is a white light.

Eventually you wake up feeling weird, you look at your hands, they’re purple for some reason and for some reason you hear your voice somewhere different than where it was heard after the machine went off, when you see your reflection in a piece of glass that broke off the machine you see kat’s body and you hear your voice come out of it, that’s when it hits you, you and Kat switched brains.

The confrontation extended to the backyard as your were chasing coop around, trying to get him to fix the device and switch everything back to normal, just as you are about to catch him you are grabbed from behind by a pair of mystery hands.

The hands wrap a yellow swaddle around you and shoves a matching yellow bonnet on your head, as you look up you see your sister holding you in one hand and holding a bottle of warm milk in the other hand.

“Mr Kat, it’s time to play mommy and baby” you try to protest but she shoves the bottle into your mouth and she carries you upstairs, the bottle must’ve been laced with sleeping pills because you pass out pretty quickly

You awaken
1.title: The swap begins

12.content:
You suddenly wake up when you hear the door open and Millie walks in, “mr Kat, rise and shine” as your eyes open you see her staring down at you “good morning baby”, you try to sit up but your wrists are restrained to the crib and your ankles are bound together with duct tape.

“Ugh, Millie, it’s me, it’s coop, not Kat, now let me out of here now”, she looks at you and says “awww, is the wittle baby cwanky because he made big stinky mess in his diaper, shall we see”

Millie removes your diaper to find that
12.title: In A crib

choices: An enema to cool you down
122.content:
She suddenly gasps “No poopies, well don’t you worry baby, momma Millie has just the thing for your no poopy problem”

She leaves and returns with
122.title: You haven’t made poopies

1222.content:
“Mommy’s homemade poop inducer will be just the thing to fix your no poopy problem, it’s a yummy mixture of puréed baked beans, prune juice, extra strength laxatives and castor oil” she removes your restraints, picks you up, cradles you and shoves the bottle into your mouth, it tastes vile and Immediately after finishing it you unload a large amount of warm mushy poop into your diaper.

Millie lays you down on the changing table and decides to
1222.title: A large bottle of “poop inducer”

12222.content:
Millie pulls out 3 diapers, puts them over your already messy diaper and says “I think baby Kat has room for more poopies”, she removes your bonnet and says “now lie still baby, it’s time to get you dressed into something cuter”

She walks over to the closest and returns with
12222.title: Put more diapers on you

122222.content:
Millie returns and redressed you, you’re unable to see what you’re wearing until she puts you in front of a mirror, she’s put the girliest dress you’ve ever seen in your life on you, it’s bright pink, very frilly and very poofy, it also comes with matching pink booties and mittens, a pink bonnet that resembles a tiara and a bright pink bib that reads “mommy’s little princess”.

“Awwww, don’t you look just so adorable” says Millie as she picked you up, “now it’s
122222.title: The pretty princess set

choices: A large jar of baby food
A large pouch of baby food
A large bowl of baby food
1222221.content:
Millie sits you down in a baby doll high chair, your arms are immediately pinned to your sides and the tray presses against your stomach, trapping you in the chair, Millie hears your stomach rumble and says “oh my, mr Kat must be really hungry, but don’t you worry, I’ll fill up your tummy wummy with some nummy nummies” “Millie, please let me go, I’m not Kat, I’m-“ you try to say before she shoves a pacifier in your mouth and says “silly mr Kat, I’m the mommy and you’re the baby, and the rules are that the baby must do whatever the mommy tells them, no questions asked”

She leaves and returns with
1222221.title: Feeding time

12222211.content: Millie walks over to the chair and plops onto the tray a large spoon and a jar of baby food labeled
12222211.title: A large jar of baby food

choices: Change your diaper and play dress up
122222111.content:
As she unscrews the lid of the jar and scoops up some of the brown mush she says “mmmmm, yummy beef and gravy, baby Kat is gonna love this”

She scoops up some of the brown mush and slowly moves it towards your face “ok mr Kat, here comes the Yum yum train, right into the station, Choo Choo, yum yum express coming through, Choo Choo, next stop tummyland”, the more she tries to shove the spoon into your mouth, the more you try to avoid it by moving your head. Eventually Millie pulled out a roll of duct tape, forces your mouth open and puts some tape on your jaw and your chest, keeping your mouth permanently open, she then proceeds to start shovelling spoonful after spoonful of brown mush into your mouth, once the last spoonful has been swallowed Millie removes the tape and removes you from the high chair

“Ok mr Kat now it’s time for mommy to
122222111.title: Beef & gravy

choices: mild chilli con carne with rice & paprika
12222212.content: Millie walks over to the chair and plops onto the tray a large spoon and a pouch of baby food labeled
12222212.title: A large pouch of baby food

122222123.content:
You shudder as you read the label on the pouch, it may be mild but for you, it would still be extremely spicy, she shoves a large spoonful of red mush into your mouth, once it touches your tongue all you taste is spice so you spit it out immediately “agh, oh my god that’s so spicy, I can’t eat it”. She grabs the pouch and walks behind you, grabs your nose, as you open your mouth she shoves the nozzle of the pouch in and says “bad baby, eat your food”, she then proceeds to squeeze the pouch until it’s empty and all the mush is down your throat.

As she’s cleaning you up she announces that it’s
122222123.title: mild chilli con carne with rice & paprika

12222213.content: Millie walks over to the chair and plops onto the tray a large spoon and a bowl of baby food labeled
12222213.title: A large bowl of baby food

122222133.content:
Without warning she shoves a large spoonful of chunky brown mush and says “have some beef stew with spuds, yummy”, she continues the shovel spoonful after spoonful of chunky brown mush down your throat.

As you swallow the last spoonful Millie says “it looks like mr Kat
122222133.title: Beef Stew with spuds

choices: Put you down for a nap
1222221331.content:
Despite looking stuffed, Millie looks at you and says “I think mr Kat is still a bit hungry wungry, and I know just what to feed you” she returns 30 minutes later with a large spoon, a bowl of chunky brown mush and a camcorder attached to a tripod.

She turns on the camera, as she’s stirring the mush she looks at you and says “say hi mr Kat, say mommy’s gonna feed me strained beef liver, for the first time today, and I think your gonna love it”.

“Ok mr Kat. Open wide, say ahhh” you barely get to open your mouth before Millie starts shovelling spoonful after spoonful of strained beef liver into your mouth.

Once the bowl is empty Millie says “ok mr Kat, time for mommy to
1222221331.title: Is still hungry

13.content:
Your vision slowly clears, you look around and see that you’re wearing a large pink diaper that’s very puffy, you catch a glance at the mirror in her room and you see that your restrained by your wrists, chest and ankles to a baby doll high chair.

Suddenly the door swings open and Millie walks in holding a bib that reads “mommy’s little stinker”. “Millie, please let me go, I’m not Kat, I’m-“ You try to say but all she does is tie that bib around your neck, shove a pacifier in your mouth and says “silly mr Kat, I’m the mommy and you’re the baby, and the rules are that the baby must do whatever the mommy tells them, no questions asked, and right now mommy wants you to eat, because if you eat you’ll make poopies, and if you make poopies you’ll make mommy very happy”.

She removes your pacifier and says “now would baby like spinach, broccoli, peas or green beans?”, you look at her in disgust and say “eww, no way they all sound gross”, she shoves the pacifier back into your mouth and as she’s walking away she says “fine, all of the above it is”.

She returns around 10 minutes later with a large spoon and a bowl of slimy green mush “is mr Kat ready to fill up his tummy wummy with some nummy nummies”, she scoops up some of the green mush and moves it slowly towards your mouth. As you turn your head away and keep your mouth shut tight she says “come on now baby, don’t be difficult, you don’t wanna make momma angry do you, after hearing that yo open up and swallow the mush, the taste is vile but under fear of punishment you finish the entire bowl.

As Millie cleans your face she says “ok mr Kat, now it’s time for
13.title: In a high chair

132.content: She picks you up and says “ok mr Kat, now where gonna play
132.title: Playtime

1323.content: She gives it a little more thought and decides that you’re going to be playing
1323.title: Something else

13232.content:
“Oh my, you don’t look so good mr Kat, well don’t you worry, Doctor Millie will take good care of you”

Your laying down on The changing table wearing nothing apart from your pacifier and diaper that was just put on you. Millie walks over holding a case full of real doctor’s equipment, “ok first things first, let’s check your heart rate” Millie presses the stethoscope against your chest and holds it there, it feels cold and uncomfortable, she puts the stethoscope away and picks you up, “you’re heart rate’s a little high but that’s nothing to worry about, now let’s weigh you” says Millie as she puts you down on a set of scales, after a couple of seconds of looking at the scales, she picks you up and carries you back to the table

“You’re a little underweight so we’re gonna have to feed you” you look at her shocked, “feed me, I don’t need to eat, you’ve already fed me 5 minutes ago” Millie looks at you with a stern face and says “now if doctor Millie says that her patient needs to eat, then her patient needs to eat and there’s not gonna be any ands ifs or buts about it” Millie walks away and returns with a paddle pop stick and a small light “now let’s check inside that pretty little mouth of yours, say ahhh” as you open your mouth Millie presses the paddle pop stick against your tongue and shines the light in your mouth for about a minute then removes both of them,

“Ok mr Kat you’re doing so well and we’re almost done” says Millie as she places you on your stomach and pulls down your diaper, “only thing left is to check your temperature the old fashioned way” you look worried as she says while holding a rectal thermometer “now we can do this the easy way or the hard way”

You try to crawl away but she puts the full force of her palm on your back stopping you, “we’re doing this the hard way then” says Millie as she slowly inserts the thermometer into your rectum, as you squirm around all Millie does is rub your back softly and say “there there mr Kat, it’ll all be over soon, everything will be ok” after a couple of minutes she removes the thermometer, pulls your diaper back up and sits you up.

“Ok, your temperature is higher than normal so doctor Millie needs to get you some special medicine”, Millie comes back 5 minutes later with a large spoon and a bottle of castor oil, as she pours a lot of it onto the spoon and walks towards you she says “you are a sick baby, so now you have to take, castor oil, now open wide, say ahhhh” you reluctantly swallow the oil, you want to spit it out but Millie covers your mouth forcing you to swallow it.

Millie picks you up and says “well we need to feed you so that we can put some weight on that cute wittle tummy wummy of yours, and not only that, but your need to make some poopy woopies in your diapey wipey” she sets you down in the chair and decides that she will
13232.title: Doctor and patient

info.brief_description: During the episode board Kat, coop (who is stuck in kat’s body) becomes his sisters doll
info.description:
Characters

Coop: age 10

Millie: age 9

Mr Kat: age unknown

Rules:

No sex

No death

Story is told from mr kat’s POV

Notes: in this universe Millie is super smart and a genius inventor

Here are links to my other stories, additions would be greatly appreciated
